name: GNSSAddWp
title: GNSSAddWp
syntax: dword GNSSAddWp( double latitude, double longitude, double altitude )
description: This function inserts a new waypoint at the end of the waypoint list. The unit of the altitude parameter depends on the system of measurement units selected with the GNSSSetUnits function.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: latitude of the new waypoint in degrees
